---
title: "How to Engage in Politics as Faculty"
date: "2026-05-19"
description: "A small menu for an unsettled moment. Campus Connect 2026 talk on what political engagement can look like for faculty who aren't full-time organizers."
categories: [presentation, faculty, politics, campus connect]
path: /assets/how-to-engage-in-politics-as-faculty.pdf
---

```{=html}
<p>Opening <a href="/assets/how-to-engage-in-politics-as-faculty.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">the slide deck (PDF)</a>…</p>
<script>window.location.replace("/assets/how-to-engage-in-politics-as-faculty.pdf");</script>
```
